general.title: Allgemein
general.languageHint: Sprache der Benutzeroberfläche. Deine eigenen Eingaben (Kontakte, Notizen, Nachrichten) werden nie übersetzt.

designToken.title: Design Token System
designToken.body: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS v4 + CSS Variables. Alle Tokens in src/index.css.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Manage members and invite new people.
team.emailHint: Email delivery follows (Edge Function). The invitation is already saved.

members.title: Members
members.desc: Who is on the team, their role and permissions.

invite.already_member: This person is already a member
invite.noMailHint: Automatic email sending is coming — until then copy the invitation link and send it yourself.

members.requestsDesc: Permission and approval requests from the team.
members.requestsSoon: Requests will appear here once the AI chat can raise them.
members.rightsDesc: In addition to the role. Role permissions are fixed.
members.rightsHint: Role permissions cannot be removed individually — change the role instead.
members.historyDesc: Role and permission changes for this person.

role.title: Change role?
role.body: {{name}} will get the role {{role}}. This immediately changes what they can do.

deactivate.title: Deactivate member?
deactivate.body: {{name}} will no longer be able to sign in. Assignments and history are kept.

reactivate.title: Reactivate member?
reactivate.body: {{name}} will be able to sign in again.

remove.title: Remove member?
remove.body: {{name}} disappears from the team. Assigned contacts and deals are kept.

mfa.bannerTitle: Protect your account with two-factor authentication
mfa.bannerBody: Recommended for owners and admins — an extra code at login protects against unauthorized access.
mfa.setupHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, 1Password) and enter the 6-digit code.
mfa.enrollError: Couldn't start 2FA — please try again later

errors.generic: Etwas hat nicht geklappt. Bitte erneut versuchen.
errors.offline: Keine Verbindung. Wir versuchen es automatisch erneut.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.body: This page could not be loaded. Reload it — your data is safe.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.resetSubtitle: We'll send you a reset link
login.resetSentTitle: We've sent you a reset link.
login.error: That didn't work just now — please try again
login.errorRate: Too many attempts — please wait a moment and try again
login.errorNetwork: No connection — please check your internet
login.errorGeneric: That didn't work just now — please try again
login.resetNewSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account
login.resetInvalidBody: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.

hunter.title: Hunter
hunter.subtitle: Finde Leads, tracke Signale und verwalte Abschlussphasen.

common.instructAiPlaceholder: Sag der AI, was angepasst werden soll...

overview.top5Hint: Sobald die Priorisierung aktiv ist, zeigt Sherloq hier die Top-Aufgaben aus allen Bereichen.

leadCard.noTaskHint: Pflicht — Deal braucht eine offene Aufgabe
leadCard.stagnatedHint: Deal stagniert — AI empfiehlt nächsten Schritt
leadCard.coldHint: Kontakt wird kalt. Letzter Kanal (Email) ohne Response. AI empfiehlt Kanalwechsel zu LinkedIn.

newPipeline.title: Neu in Pipeline
newPipeline.subtitle: Frisch in die Pipeline eingegangen — kürzlich angelegte Deals.
newPipeline.label: Neu in Pipeline

followUps.emptyDesc: Nichts zu tun — alle Follow-ups erledigt.

signal_panel.draft_placeholder: Der AI-Entwurf erscheint hier — oder schreib selbst.
signal_panel.instruct_placeholder: Sag der AI, was angepasst werden soll, z. B. „Schreib mir daraus eine E-Mail“...
signal_panel.ai_hint: AI kann Kanal, Tonalität, Länge und CTA anpassen.

card.stagnatedHint: Achtung — Deal stagniert seit 14 Tagen, Follow-Up empfohlen
card.noTaskHint: Pflicht — Deal braucht eine offene Aufgabe

addModal.title: Neuen SDR Lead anlegen
addModal.kurzaktePlaceholder: Interesse an schnellerer BDR Einarbeitung im EMEA Raum. Erwartet DSGVO Abnahme...

stagnated.context: Kein Fortschritt seit {{days}} Tagen in Stage {{stage}}. Letzter Kontakt: Email vor {{lastContactDays}}T, keine Antwort.
stagnated.aiHint: AI kann Tonalität, Länge, Kanal und CTA anpassen.

signal.aiHint: AI kann Kanal, Tonalität, Länge und CTA anpassen.
signal.instructPlaceholder: Sag der AI, was angepasst werden soll, z. B. 'Schreib mir daraus eine E-Mail'...

cold.lastContact: Letzter Kontakt: {{channel}} vor {{days}} Tagen · Keine Antwort

noTask.everyDealNeedsTask: Jeder Deal braucht eine offene Aufgabe. KI schlägt passende Task vor.

kontakte.title: Kontakte
kontakte.columnsHint: Spalten per Drag am Titel verschieben · Kante ziehen ändert die Breite.
kontakte.noHitsDesc: Kein Kontakt passt zu diesem Filter.
kontakte.emptyDesc: Lege deinen ersten Kontakt an oder importiere eine Liste.

create.title: Neuen Kontakt anlegen
create.requiredHint: Pflicht: Vor- + Nachname oder LinkedIn — alles Weitere ist optional.
create.softDup: Mögliches Duplikat (gleicher Name + Firma). Du kannst trotzdem anlegen.
create.createErrorToast: Konnte gerade nicht anlegen — nochmal versuchen

lists.typeDynamicDesc: Mitglieder automatisch über den aktuellen Filter
lists.dynamicNeedsFilter: Aktiviere zuerst einen Filter, um eine dynamische Liste zu speichern
lists.emptyDesc: Diese Liste hat noch keine Mitglieder.
lists.dynamicNotSelectable: Dynamische Liste — Mitglieder laufen automatisch über die Regel
lists.deleteConfirm: „{{name}}“ wird dauerhaft gelöscht. Die Kontakte selbst bleiben erhalten.
lists.actionErrorToast: Aktion hat gerade nicht geklappt — nochmal versuchen

delete.title: Wirklich löschen?
delete.confirm_one: {{count}} Kontakt wird gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
delete.confirm_other: {{count}} Kontakte werden gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
delete.confirmOne: „{{name}}" wird gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.

import.title: Kontakte importieren
import.dropzoneHint: CSV oder Excel (.xlsx) · max. 20 MB / 50.000 Zeilen
import.expectedColumns: Erwartete Spalten: Vorname, Nachname, E-Mail, LinkedIn … (mindestens Name oder LinkedIn zwingend)
import.parseFailed: Diese Datei konnten wir nicht lesen — bitte CSV oder Excel.
import.emptyFile: Die Datei enthält keine auswertbaren Zeilen.
import.mapSubtitle: Wir haben deine Spalten automatisch erkannt — prüfe und korrigiere bei Bedarf.
import.mapRequired: Bitte ordne mindestens Name (Vor-/Nachname) oder LinkedIn-URL zu.
import.nothingDesc: Alle Zeilen sind Duplikate oder fehlerhaft — es bleibt kein neuer Kontakt zum Anlegen.
import.checkFailedDesc: Wir konnten die bestehenden Kontakte für den Abgleich gerade nicht laden — bitte erneut versuchen.
import.importErrorDesc: Ein Teil konnte nicht importiert werden — du kannst es erneut versuchen.
import.doneDesc: Die Kontakte stehen jetzt in deiner Kontaktliste.
import.undoHint: Entfernt nur die in diesem Import neu erstellten Kontakte (bis 7 Tage).
import.undoConfirmDesc: This removes the {{count}} contacts newly created in this import (along with companies newly created in this import). Contacts that were only enriched or skipped stay untouched.
import.undoneDesc: The newly created contacts were removed again.
import.aichatCtaTitle: What do you want to do with your new leads?
import.aichatCtaSubtitle: Ask the AI Chat — it knows your freshly imported contacts and gets going with you right away.

duplicates.title: Duplikate verwalten
duplicates.mergeSubtitle: Ein Datensatz bleibt, der andere wandert in den Papierkorb.
duplicates.noDiff: Beide Datensätze sind in allen Feldern identisch — einfach zusammenführen.
duplicates.honestyNote: Keine Daten gehen verloren: Alle Deals, Tasks, Notizen, Kommunikation und Listen-Mitgliedschaften beider Datensätze hängen danach am zusammengeführten Datensatz.
duplicates.confirmMergeDesc: „{{winner}}“ bleibt bestehen, „{{loser}}“ wandert in den Papierkorb. Alle Verknüpfungen wandern mit.
duplicates.confirmDeleteDesc: „{{name}}“ wird in den Papierkorb verschoben (nicht endgültig gelöscht).
duplicates.emptyDesc: Deine Datenbank ist sauber. Neue Doppelungen melden wir automatisch.
duplicates.errorDesc: Die Duplikat-Prüfung ist gerade fehlgeschlagen — bitte erneut versuchen.

table.columnsHint: Spalten per Drag am Titel verschieben · Kante ziehen ändert die Breite.

companies.title: Companies
companies.noHitsDesc: Keine Companies passen zu diesem Filter.
companies.emptyDesc: Sobald Companies angelegt oder importiert werden, erscheinen sie hier.

detail.notFoundDesc: Diese Company existiert nicht oder wurde entfernt.
detail.tabsSoonDesc: Kontakte, Deals, Aktivität und Notizen dieser Company werden im nächsten Schritt (K-4b) verdrahtet.
detail.noContactsDesc: Dieser Company sind noch keine Kontakte zugeordnet.

delete.title: Wirklich löschen?
delete.confirm_one: {{count}} Company wird gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden. Verknüpfte Kontakte bleiben erhalten.
delete.confirm_other: {{count}} Companies werden gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden. Verknüpfte Kontakte bleiben erhalten.
delete.confirmOne: „{{name}}" wird gelöscht — das kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden. Verknüpfte Kontakte bleiben erhalten (verlieren nur die Zuordnung).

auth.inviteOnlyBody: Your account is not linked to an organization yet. Please ask your administrator for an invitation.
auth.invitePlaceholderBody: This page will be provided with the invitation flow.
auth.unsubPlaceholderBody: This page will be provided with the email layer.

personal.title: Personal settings
personal.subtitle: Your profile, your view and your security.

profile.generalDesc: Your name, avatar and role in the workspace.
profile.name: Name
profile.bookingDesc: Connect your calendar so leads can book directly.
profile.sigDesc: Your signature for sending from Sherloq.
profile.bookingLinkExternalPlaceholder: e.g. HubSpot, Google Calendar, Outlook Bookings — any link

appearance.navDesc: Show or hide modules and change their order.
appearance.hint: Hidden modules stay reachable via search (⌘K) and the AI chat. This only changes the left bar.

security.pwDesc: Protect your account with a strong password.

company.productPricingIntro: What the AI knows about your offering when it writes messages. Nothing here is required.
company.completenessHelp: The more you add, the more specific the AI can write.

hint.noProducts: Add a product first — without one the AI has nothing to talk about.
hint.benefit: Biggest win right now: the main benefit of "{{product}}" — it carries every message.
hint.audience: Biggest win right now: the audience for "{{product}}".
hint.usps: Biggest win right now: one USP — the AI builds the pitch from it.
hint.description: Biggest win right now: the short description of "{{product}}".
hint.competitorWhy: Biggest win right now: why you over your competitor — helps with objections.
hint.name: Biggest win right now: a product name — without it no message can name the offering.
hint.voiceBio: Biggest win right now: a short profile — who is writing here?
hint.voiceStyle: Biggest win right now: your selling/reasoning style.
hint.voiceTone: Biggest win right now: your baseline tone — so the AI sounds like you.
hint.voiceSamples: Biggest win right now: real examples — the strongest signal for your style.
hint.voiceDosDonts: Biggest win right now: your do's & don'ts.
hint.summary: Biggest win right now: a short description — who are you, what do you do?
hint.productModel: Biggest win right now: your product/service model.
hint.valueOutcome: Biggest win right now: your value/outcome — the core promise.
hint.problemsSolved: Biggest win right now: which problems you solve — the strongest language.
hint.businessOutcomes: Biggest win right now: the business outcomes you enable.
hint.offerings: Biggest win right now: your offering categories.
hint.voiceCoreTopics: Biggest win right now: your core topics — good hooks for the AI.
hint.voiceSentenceStructure: Biggest win right now: your sentence structure/rhythm.
hint.voiceToneAttributes: Biggest win right now: your tone attributes.
hint.voiceVocabulary: Biggest win right now: your typical vocabulary.
hint.voiceEmojiFormatting: Biggest win right now: your emoji/formatting habits.
hint.voiceHookStrategies: Biggest win right now: your hook strategies.
hint.voiceEngagement: Biggest win right now: your engagement patterns.
hint.voiceCtaStyle: Biggest win right now: your CTA style.

company.productsHelp: What you sell. Multiple products possible, all fields optional.
company.removeProductConfirm: "{{name}}" will be removed from this list. Existing deals keep their reference.

placeholder.name: Product name
placeholder.whyUs: Why are you the better choice?

company.priceRelease: AI may mention this price in messages
company.priceReleaseHelp: Off by default: prices change and are often negotiable. Only turn this on if this price is binding and may be quoted.
company.uspsHelp: Applies to the whole company, not a single product.
company.competitorsHelp: Who you compete with — and why you. Company-wide.
company.aiHint: The AI button on each field will later suggest content for that field. Coming soon.
company.saveFailed: That didn't work just now — please try again.
company.aiFillProduct: Let AI fill in all fields of this product
company.statusMissingTip: The AI is still missing these details

profile.intro: What the AI knows about your company — positioning, offering and market. Nothing is required.

summary.label: Summary
summary.help: In one or two sentences: who you are, what you do.
summary.ph: e.g. We help B2B sales teams prospect personally at scale.

productModel.label: Product / service model
productModel.ph: How do you deliver? Platform, consulting, subscription …

valueOutcome.label: Value & outcome
valueOutcome.ph: What measurably improves for your customers?

problems.label: Problems you solve
problems.ph: e.g. generic outreach that gets ignored

outcomes.label: Business outcomes
outcomes.ph: e.g. higher reply rates, shorter sales cycles

competitors.whyPh: Why are you the better choice?

profile.contextHelp: Don't type everything manually. The AI can analyze your website to pre-fill the profile.
profile.detailsHelp: Your company details per tab. All optional.
profile.completenessHelp: The more you add here, the more specific the AI can be.
profile.aiHint: The "Scan website" button will later pre-fill the profile automatically. Coming soon.

icp.removeDesc: The audience and all its people will be removed. This can't be undone.

fitRationale.label: Fit rationale
fitRationale.ph: Why is it a strong fit?

desiredOutcomes.label: Desired outcomes
desiredOutcomes.ph: What does this audience want to achieve?

problems.label: Problems solved
problems.ph: Which problem do you solve for them?

persona.title: People
persona.namePh: e.g. Head of Sales / VP Sales
persona.removeDesc: This person will be removed from the audience. This can't be undone.

jobTitles.label: Job titles
jobTitles.ph: e.g. Head of Sales, VP Sales, Sales Director

responsibilities.label: Responsibilities
responsibilities.ph: What is the person responsible for?

goals.label: Goals
goals.ph: What does the person want to achieve?

coreProblems.label: Core problems
coreProblems.ph: What keeps the person up at night?

voice.intro: Your personal writing voice. The AI SDR will use it to write in YOUR voice. Nothing is required — fill in what fits.
voice.previewEmpty: Complete your profile first, then your voice card appears here.
voice.trainerHelp: Later, the AI analyzes your past content and builds your voice profile automatically.
voice.completenessHelp: The more you add here, the more accurately the AI will match your tone.
voice.channelsHelp: Per channel, how you write there. All optional.

bio.label: Short profile
bio.ph: Who are you, what do you do?

style.label: Selling / reasoning style
style.ph: How do you convince? Problem-first, story, numbers …

coreTopics.label: Core topics
coreTopics.ph: What do you write/talk about most? One topic per line.

samples.label: Examples
samples.ph: Paste a few real examples that are typical of you.

dosAlways.label: What you always do
dosAlways.ph: What always appears in your messages

dosNever.label: What you never do
dosNever.ph: What never appears in your messages

toneAttributes.label: Tone attributes
toneAttributes.ph: One attribute per line (e.g. direct, analytical)

sentenceStructure.label: Sentence structure
sentenceStructure.ph: How do you build sentences? Short/long, rhythm, line breaks …

emojiFormatting.label: Emoji & formatting
emojiFormatting.ph: How do you use emojis, symbols, spacing?

hookStrategies.label: Hook strategies
hookStrategies.ph: How do you open? One strategy per line

engagementPatterns.label: Engagement patterns
engagementPatterns.ph: How do you respond to others' posts?

ctaStyle.label: CTA style
ctaStyle.ph: How do you lead to the next step? (e.g. a low-friction question)

voice.aiFillAll: Let AI fill in all voice fields
voice.aiHint: The AI button will later generate a suggestion for exactly this field. Coming soon.
